title: Darwin Sprinting System
description: This mod adds a stamina system to minecraft which includes a max sprinting time which is configurable and if you drain it completely you will have to wait an extra amount of time(configurable) until you can recover your energy.
body:
This mod adds a stamina system to minecraft which includes a max sprinting time which is configurable and if you drain it completely you will have to wait an extra amount of time(configurable) until you can recover your energy.

Enchantments include:
Maximum Stamina
Stamina Regeneration
Stamina Overcharge Reduction

![Stamina bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e6beb8805b628a9c23a9bf6d58308c02b7d928.png)
